hero.title: Korea, Beautifully Told.
hero.subtitle: A truly local journey with a local friend.

services.title: Everything you need, taken care of
services.subtitle: From your first arrival to the last farewell — handled by people who know Korea inside out.

destinations.title: Korea, beyond the obvious
destinations.subtitle: Coastal cities, ancient capitals, hidden island retreats — all within a few hours of one another.

why.title: The difference is in the details

items.concierge_desc: Reach a real person any hour, in your language. Lost passport, late train, last-minute change — we handle it.
items.drivers_desc: Every driver is licensed, insured, English-speaking, and selected for hospitality first, driving second.
items.languages_desc: Service and bookings in English, Japanese, Traditional and Simplified Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai, and Korean.
items.pricing_desc: All-in quotes in your currency. No hidden fees, no surge pricing, no surprises at checkout.

testimonials.title: Trusted by travelers from across Asia and beyond

items.tw_text: Three days in Busan with a private chauffeur — every restaurant, every viewpoint felt chosen for us. Worth every dollar.
items.jp_text: I booked a Templestay in Gyeongju the night before. Confirmed in two hours, on the road by morning. Remarkable service.
items.us_text: We had a medical procedure scheduled in Busan. KoreaHaru coordinated the clinic, the recovery hotel, and a quiet driver. Flawless.

posts.post_1_title: Three days in Busan, the way locals would do it
posts.post_1_excerpt: A pace that lets you taste the city without ticking boxes — sea, market, hilltop, and a quiet morning at the temple.
posts.post_2_title: Where to find the best raw fish in Tongyeong
posts.post_2_excerpt: The market is the easy answer. The better one is a small counter behind the ferry terminal — here's how to find it.
posts.post_3_title: A traveler's guide to dermatology clinics in Busan
posts.post_3_excerpt: Which clinics speak English, what procedures are worth flying for, and what to budget for a single afternoon.

cta_strip.title: Talk to a concierge
cta_strip.subtitle: Tell us when you're coming and what you care about. We'll send a quiet, considered itinerary within a day.

common.trust_note: All bookings include 24/7 concierge support and a written itinerary in your language.

chauffeur.title: A driver who knows the road, and when to be quiet
chauffeur.subtitle: Mercedes V-Class, Hyundai Staria Lounge, and Kia Carnival with English-speaking chauffeurs across Korea — by the hour, day, or multi-day.
chauffeur.intro_body: Our chauffeurs are licensed, insured, and chosen for hospitality first. They know the back routes around Busan, the quiet entrances at Bulguksa, and the right time to leave Tongyeong to catch the light at Geoje. Every itinerary is briefed the day before; every car is detailed before you step in.
chauffeur.fleet_subtitle: Three vehicles, chosen for the kind of travel Korea actually requires.
chauffeur.fleet_v_desc: The quiet choice. Twin captain's chairs, panoramic roof, fridge. Best for couples and small families on multi-day routes.
chauffeur.fleet_staria_desc: Lounge-style swivel seats and a low step-in. Our most-booked vehicle for parents and grandparents traveling together.
chauffeur.fleet_carnival_desc: Generous luggage capacity. Right for groups visiting multiple cities or arriving with golf clubs.
chauffeur.inclusion_4: Child seat on request, no charge
chauffeur.pricing_subtitle: All-in quotes in your currency. No surge, no hidden fees.
chauffeur.process_1_body: Share your dates, where you're staying, and what you want to see. We'll suggest pacing if you'd like.
chauffeur.process_2_body: Vehicle, chauffeur profile, and a draft itinerary. Adjust freely before you pay.
chauffeur.process_3_body: Stripe, PayPal, Alipay+, or WeChat Pay. Full refund up to 48 hours before pickup.
chauffeur.process_4_body: Your chauffeur meets you at the airport, hotel, or station. Concierge is reachable at every hour.

accommodation.title: Hand-picked stays, from oceanfront suites to mountain temples
accommodation.subtitle: We don't list every hotel — we list the ones we've stayed in, vetted the staff, and would book again ourselves.
accommodation.intro_body: Korea has hundreds of hotels. Most are unremarkable. We work with around forty properties across Busan, Gyeongju, Tongyeong, Geoje, and Namhae — luxury hotels, design boutiques, traditional hanok, templestays, and a handful of pool villas. Each one is on the list because we know the staff, the rooms, and the small details.
accommodation.cat_luxury_desc: Park Hyatt Busan, Signiel Busan, Lahan Select Gyeongju. Suites and club access arranged.
accommodation.cat_boutique_desc: Quiet properties under fifty rooms — coastal in Busan, courtyards in Gyeongju.
accommodation.cat_hanok_desc: Restored traditional houses in Gyeongju and Bukchon. Private courtyards, breakfast in-room.
accommodation.cat_temple_desc: Curated programs at Beomeosa, Tongdosa, and Bulguksa — including English orientation.
accommodation.cat_villa_desc: Private villas on Geoje and Namhae for families and small groups, with optional chef and butler.
accommodation.cat_serviced_desc: Two-bedroom and three-bedroom residences in Haeundae and Gwangalli for longer stays.
accommodation.inclusion_2: Early check-in and late check-out negotiation
accommodation.inclusion_5: Direct line to concierge during your stay
accommodation.pricing_subtitle: Booked at the property's published rate, or better when our relationship allows. We don't add markup.

sim.title: Connected the moment you land
sim.subtitle: Pre-arranged SIM cards, eSIM activation links, and pocket WiFi — collected at the airport or delivered to your hotel.
sim.intro_body: Korean networks (SK Telecom, KT, LG U+) all offer reliable nationwide coverage. The right choice depends on your phone and your group. We arrange any of the three options below; concierge confirms which fits before you arrive.
sim.opt_sim_desc: For phones without eSIM support. Picked up at Incheon, Gimhae, or delivered to your first hotel.
sim.opt_esim_desc: QR code sent by email — activate before boarding, connect on landing. iPhone 11+ and most modern Android.
sim.opt_wifi_desc: Best for families or groups sharing one connection. Unlimited data, up to 10 devices.
sim.inclusion_2: Korean phone number (SIM and eSIM only)
sim.process_1_body: Tell us arrival airport, dates, and phone model. We confirm the right plan within an hour.
sim.process_2_body: Pickup counter at ICN / GMP / PUS, or hotel delivery the morning of arrival.
sim.process_3_body: Pocket WiFi returned at any major airport. SIM and eSIM need no return.

rail.title: Korea's rail network, booked in your name
rail.subtitle: KTX, SRT, and regional rail tickets reserved in advance — including foreign-traveler passes that aren't sold at the station.
rail.intro_body: KTX and SRT seats sell out on Korean holidays, weekends, and any route to Busan during the festival season. Foreign-traveler passes (Korea Rail Pass, KORAIL Discount Pass) must be booked online before arrival and aren't refundable from the operator. We handle reservation, seat selection, and same-day rebooking when plans change.
rail.opt_ktx_desc: Seoul ↔ Busan in 2h 40m. Standard, First Class, and Family Compartment seating.
rail.opt_srt_desc: Suseo (Gangnam-side Seoul) ↔ Busan, often less crowded than KTX. Standard and Premium.
rail.opt_pass_desc: 3 / 5 / 7-day flexible passes for foreign travelers. Unlimited rides on KTX and most lines.
rail.opt_regional_desc: Mugunghwa, ITX-Saemaul, and ITX-Cheongchun for slower scenic routes — Gyeongju, Tongyeong-bound transfers.

beauty_medical.title: Discreet concierge for dermatology, dentistry, and elective surgery
beauty_medical.subtitle: We coordinate vetted clinics in Busan and Seoul, recovery accommodation, and quiet transport — for travelers who came to Korea for the procedure as much as the trip.
beauty_medical.intro_body: Medical tourism in Korea is well-established but uneven. Some clinics speak fluent English; others use machine translation. Some prioritize tourists; others squeeze them between local appointments. We work with a small list of clinics where the doctor speaks the language, the staff understand discretion, and the schedule respects your time. Initial consultation, second opinion, recovery hotel, and a quiet driver — handled.
beauty_medical.cat_derm_desc: Laser, ultherapy, fillers, anti-aging programs at clinics in Centum and Haeundae.
beauty_medical.cat_dental_desc: Implants, veneers, whitening at JCI-accredited clinics. Multi-visit timelines planned in advance.
beauty_medical.cat_plastic_desc: Consultation referrals only — we do not book procedures sight-unseen. Recovery support included.
beauty_medical.cat_health_desc: Premium half-day and full-day check-ups at Severance and major university hospitals.
beauty_medical.cat_recovery_desc: Quiet hotels with private check-in, in-room dining, and direct transport to clinic follow-ups.
beauty_medical.pricing_subtitle: Clinic fees billed directly by the clinic — we don't mark up medical procedures. Concierge fee is flat and disclosed upfront.
beauty_medical.trust_note: We never accept commissions from medical providers. Our income is your concierge fee — that is the only way to keep the recommendation honest.

index.title: Curated Experiences in Southern Korea
index.subtitle: Immersive cultural workshops, elite sports instruction, and scenic marine leisure led by local masters.
index.intro_body: We believe travel should be active, considered, and deeply local. Our curated experiences connect you directly with certified masters of their crafts. Whether gliding across ocean waves with academic surf coaches, sailing along dramatic coastlines on a private yacht, or baking traditional heritage pastries, each program is selected for its safety, pristine facilities, and deep local roots.
index.categories_subtitle: Select from our vetted experience categories across Busan, Gyeongnam, and Gyeongju.
index.cat_surfing_desc: Elite coaching and luxury surf resort packages at Songjeong and Imrang Beach.
index.cat_yacht_desc: Scenic private charters and sunset yacht tours around Gwangalli and Haeundae.
index.cat_hanok_desc: Professional artistic photography in traditional Hanbok at Gyeongju courtyards.
index.cat_cooking_desc: Private cooking classes led by local chefs in authentic family kitchens.

surfing.title: Premium Surfing Experiences in Busan
surfing.subtitle: Discover the birthplace of Korean surf culture. Professional coaching, premium amenities, and pristine waters tailored for discerning travelers.
surfing.intro_body: Busan's unique coastal topography makes it an exceptional destination for water sports. We connect you with verified local surf academies that prioritize rigorous instruction, high-end private facilities, and strict safety standards. From the historic pioneers of Korean surfing to luxury surf resorts with beachside lounges, experience the sea in its most refined form.
surfing.section_subtitle: Select from our vetted partners along Songjeong and Imrang Beach, chosen for their outstanding hospitality, expert coaches, and pristine amenities.
surfing.school_1_tagline: The Pioneer of Korean Surfing: Academic, Safe, and Traditional
surfing.school_1_inclusions: Academic theory briefing, onshore stance training, real-time in-water coaching, full rental of professional surfboards and premium wetsuits, private shower access.
surfing.school_1_reviews: Celebrated globally as the very first official surfing institution in Korea. Guests note that the master instructors possess exceptionally refined, academic coaching methods and a dedication to strict water safety that brings complete peace of mind.
surfing.school_1_ideal: Family travelers, mature VIP guests, and purists who value rigid safety, rich heritage, and structured professional sports education.
surfing.school_2_tagline: Luxury Amenities, Hip Beachside Lounge, and All-Day Free Surfing
surfing.school_2_price: Beginner Lesson (LV.1 Single Session) – 65,000 KRW / 1:1 Special Private Lesson – 150,000 KRW
surfing.school_2_inclusions: Formal group/private coaching, unlimited free surfing until closing hour, high-definition action snapshots captured by coaches, premium powder room access.
surfing.school_2_reviews: Widely praised as the largest, most cutting-edge commercial surf resort in Korea. Highlighted for its resort-style gender-separated shower complexes and a chic beachside F&B café/open-air pub lounge with an infectious holiday vibe.
surfing.school_2_ideal: Trendy global millennials, affluent young travelers, and individuals seeking luxury amenities, high-quality social media snapshots, and post-surf social atmospheres.
surfing.school_3_tagline: A Secluded Natural Sanctuary: Exclusive Small-Group Elite Coaching
surfing.school_3_inclusions: Intimate small-group theory and stance instruction, meticulous 1-on-1 style coaching, custom board and premium suit rental, private shower access.
surfing.school_3_reviews: A hidden, tranquil surf oasis completely removed from the heavy tourist traffic of main Busan. Since it is the sole surf academy on Imrang Beach, it feels like a chartered private ocean. Perfect for focused wave reading.
surfing.school_3_ideal: Ultra-high-net-worth VIPs desiring absolute privacy, couples seeking quiet romantic healing, and parents looking for highly dedicated, safe surf training for children.
surfing.inclusion_6: 24/7 real-time support from our concierge team
surfing.pricing_subtitle: All lessons are booked directly at the partner schools' published rate. We never add markups. Your booking fee covers concierge translation, priority slots, and real-time coordinator support.

hanok_photo.title: Hanok Heritage & Photoshoots in Gyeongju
hanok_photo.subtitle: Professional photography, authentic tea ceremonies, and exquisite architecture inside Korea's thousand-year ancient capital.
hanok_photo.intro_body: Gyeongju, the ancient capital of the Silla Dynasty, is an open-air museum of traditional Korean architecture. We connect you with vetted Hanbok boutiques, historic tea rooms, and modern architectural lounges nestled inside traditional Hanok conservation zones. Walk among thousand-year dynasty shingles and capture memories of your curated Silla journey in its most refined form.
hanok_photo.section_subtitle: Select from our vetted premium partners across Gyeongju, chosen for their outstanding hospitality, beautiful architectural detail, and professional service.
hanok_photo.school_1_tagline: The Ultimate Wardrobe: High-Volume Trends, Vibrant Hair Styling, and Prime Accessibility
hanok_photo.school_1_price: Traditional Hanbok Rental (1.5 Hours): 20,000 KRW / Themed or Fusion Hanbok Rental (2.5 Hours): 40,000 KRW / Premium All-Inclusive (All-Day Rental + Luxury Hair Styling): 55,000 KRW
hanok_photo.school_1_inclusions: Garment rental, petticoat/underskirt, and complementary basic hair braiding service adorned with standard traditional pins.
hanok_photo.school_1_reviews: Widely celebrated as the most convenient large-scale boutique for international tourists due to its strategic position next to Daerungwon Royal Tombs. Reviewers love the extensive selection of contemporary designs tailored beautifully to non-Asian body frames, and the lightning-fast hair arrangement that looks phenomenal in photos.
hanok_photo.school_1_ideal: Global millennials, active content creators, and fast-paced tourists who prioritize capturing vivid, eye-catching social media snapshots in high-quality garments.
hanok_photo.school_2_name: Gyochon Hanok Village Tea Ceremony Hall
hanok_photo.school_2_tagline: The Art of Stillness: Authentic Tea Meditations inside an Active Heritage Zone
hanok_photo.school_2_price: Authentic Hanok Tea Ceremony (Base Rate per Guest): 25,000 KRW / VIP Private Manners & Tea Masterclass (Reservation Only): 50,000 KRW
hanok_photo.school_2_inclusions: Formal education on historical Korean teaware etiquette, hands-on leaf brewing (Green tea or fermented Hwang-cha), and a curated tray of premium, handmade traditional wagashi/confections.
hanok_photo.school_2_reviews: A deeply profound wellness experience. Reviewers highly praise sitting on the open wooden porch (Daecheong-maru) of a genuine historical house while brewing whole-leaf tea, led by a master instructor offering thorough, highly educational translations regarding architecture and tea cultivation.
hanok_photo.school_2_ideal: Ultra-high-net-worth VIPs desiring absolute quietude, slow-travel connoisseurs, and families seeking an authentic, educational touchpoint with Korean hospitality heritage.
hanok_photo.school_3_tagline: Architectural Sophistication: Where Millennial Design Meets Thousand-Year Dynasty Shingles
hanok_photo.school_3_price: Hanok Courtyard Entry, Signature Traditional Drink & Dessert Flight: 15,000 KRW to 22,000 KRW / Exclusive Hanok Space Rental & Professional Hanbok Snapshot Package: Starts from 150,000 KRW
hanok_photo.school_3_inclusions: Central manicured courtyard garden access, avant-garde traditional desserts, and professional private photographer options with synchronized flash equipment.
hanok_photo.school_3_reviews: Highly commended by design enthusiasts for seamlessly blending ancient timber rafters with floor-to-ceiling modern structural glass. Wearing a Hanbok in the manicured courtyard garden guarantees a flawless photoshoot without stranger interference.
hanok_photo.school_3_ideal: High-end premium clients, couples searching for high-aesthetic interior design, and travelers who appreciate high-concept modern environments that gracefully pay homage to ancient roots.
hanok_photo.inclusion_1: Priority booking and private slot reservation
hanok_photo.inclusion_2: Vetted multilingual tea masters and stylists
hanok_photo.inclusion_3: Premium Hanbok garments and hair accessories
hanok_photo.inclusion_4: Exclusive access to private photo zones
hanok_photo.inclusion_6: 24/7 real-time support from our concierge team
hanok_photo.pricing_subtitle: All experiences are reserved directly at the partner spots' published rates. We never add markups. Your booking fee covers concierge translation, priority reservations, and direct coordinator support.

cooking.title: Traditional K-Food Culinary Classes
cooking.subtitle: Professional cooking classes led by local chefs, Traditional Food Masters, and culinary educators in Busan and Gyeongju.
cooking.intro_body: Korean gastronomy is a harmony of nature, tradition, and profound fermentation techniques. We connect you with vetted culinary schools and master chefs. Whether learning trendy K-food and side dishes in a modern downtown studio in Busan or studying ancient Silla Dynasty royal court medicinal recipes in a prestigious institute in Gyeongju, experience authentic food preparation in its most educational, immersive form.
cooking.section_subtitle: Select from our vetted premium partners, chosen for their strict hygiene, professional instruction, and deep cultural storytelling.
cooking.school_1_tagline: Beyond a Meal: Trendy Modern K-Food Coupled with Intimate Cultural Storytelling
cooking.school_1_price: Regular Authentic K-Food Class (Single Session): 60,000 KRW to 70,000 KRW
cooking.school_1_inclusions: Professional English-fluent chef instruction, local ingredient breakdown, hands-on prep of main course & banchan (side dishes), plating masterclass, and a communal sit-down dining experience.
cooking.school_1_reviews: Highly commended by international travelers who love the stylish, modern kitchen-studio environment. True to their motto 'Beyond a Meal,' instructors weave fascinating historical context and folklore behind each dish in flawless English. Reviewers note it feels like filming a high-end cooking show.
cooking.school_1_ideal: Global foodies, urban wanderers, and couples who want to learn accessible, popular Korean dishes (like Bulgogi, Bibimbap, or K-Pancakes) in a chic, central city setting.
cooking.school_2_tagline: The Master's Kitchen: Prestigious Royal Court and Silla Dynasty Medicinal Gastronomy
cooking.school_2_price: International K-Food Foundation Class: 50,000 KRW to 80,000 KRW / Elite Silla Dynasty Royal Court & Gujeolpan Platter Workshop: Up to 150,000 KRW
cooking.school_2_inclusions: Audio-visual screening on Korean medicinal foods (Yakseon), live demonstration by an officially designated Traditional Food Master, individual workstation cooking practice, and a formal meal served in fine traditional brassware (Yugi).
cooking.school_2_reviews: Revered as the absolute peak of high-end traditional culinary education in Korea, run by the province's officially designated First Master of Silla Traditional Food. Reviewers rave that the depth of flavors and historical integrity operate on a completely different level than standard casual cooking schools.
cooking.school_2_ideal: High-net-worth VIP clients, multi-generational families, and serious culinary travelers seeking to explore the profound heritage, artistic plating, and elite royal history behind authentic Korean gastronomy.
cooking.inclusion_1: Priority booking and custom menu arrangement
cooking.inclusion_2: Officially certified master chefs and educators
cooking.inclusion_5: Detailed recipe cards in your language
cooking.inclusion_6: 24/7 real-time support from our concierge team
cooking.pricing_subtitle: All culinary courses are reserved directly at the partner spots' published rates. We never add markups. Your booking fee covers concierge translation, priority reservations, and direct coordinator support.

categories.sim_desc: Picked up at the airport, ready before you land.

footer.newsletter_subtitle: Seasonal recommendations and a few honest notes. No spam.
